g.text: How would you like to deploy your agent?:
Select a Foundry project to host your agent and any models or tools it uses.:
Select an Azure subscription to find existing Foundry projects.
No existing Foundry project was selected. Falling back to creating new resources.
Select an Azure location. This determines which models are available and where your Foundry project resources will be de
Model 'gpt-4.1-mini' is specified in the agent manifest.:
Select a SKU for gpt-4.1-mini v2025-04-14:
Enter model deployment name for model 'gpt-4.1-mini' (defaults to model name):
Model deployment details processed and injected into agent definition. Deployment details can also be found in the JSON
Select resources (CPU and Memory) for your agent. You can adjust these settings later in the azure.yaml file if needed
